normalized_findings.title: X-Powered-By Header Exposure
normalized_findings.description: The target website exposes the X-Powered-By header, revealing internal server technology information.
normalized_findings.remediation_hint: Review ZAP finding and apply configuration updates.

normalized_findings.title: Nginx server_tokens Enabled
normalized_findings.description: The Nginx server_tokens directive is enabled, exposing detailed version information in server response headers.
normalized_findings.remediation_hint: Review Nikto finding and apply configuration updates.

normalized_findings.title: Missing HTTP Strict-Transport-Security (HSTS)
normalized_findings.description: HTTP Strict-Transport-Security (HSTS) header is missing, making the connection vulnerable to SSL stripping attacks.
normalized_findings.remediation_hint: Review Nikto finding and apply configuration updates.

normalized_findings.title: Missing Content-Security-Policy (CSP)
normalized_findings.description: Content-Security-Policy (CSP) header is missing, exposing the target website to Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) attacks.
normalized_findings.remediation_hint: Review ZAP finding and apply configuration updates.

normalized_findings.title: Missing X-Frame-Options Header
normalized_findings.description: X-Frame-Options header is missing, allowing the application to be embedded in frames and exposed to clickjacking.
normalized_findings.remediation_hint: Review ZAP finding and apply configuration updates.

normalized_findings.title: Missing X-Content-Type-Options Header
normalized_findings.description: X-Content-Type-Options header is missing, exposing the application to MIME-type sniffing vulnerabilities.
normalized_findings.remediation_hint: Review ZAP finding and apply configuration updates.

normalized_findings.title: Legacy TLS Protocols Enabled
normalized_findings.description: The TLS configuration enables legacy protocols (TLSv1 or TLSv1.1) which are deprecated and cryptographically weak.
normalized_findings.remediation_hint: Review SSLyze finding and apply configuration updates.
